title: All The Fish - Resource Pack
description: The resource pack to go with the "All The Fish" Data Pack by CYKLOPPS & Mickey Joe, adding over 150 fish!
body:
The Resource Pack to go with the [All The Fish Data Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/all-the-fish-data-pack) by CYKLOPPS & Mickey Joe!

The "All The Fish" Data Pack is a standalone Data Pack which adds the better fishing features from the Barely Default Data Pack.

This is JUST the extra fish from the [Barely Default Data Pack]([https://modrinth.com/datapack/barely-default-data-pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/barely-default-data-pack)), nothing else from that Data Pack :)

See the trailer for the Fish Update of Barely Default here:
